text: Established Unit-I with 10,000 sq.ft shop floor under the leadership of C.S.N. Reddy.
First aerostructure RCS delivered to ISRO. Agni-1 & 2 rocket motor casings delivered to DRDO.
First industry to develop the L40 structure for GSLV — successfully delivered to ISRO.
First private sector company to integrate RCS & VTP and deliver to DRDO.
Became lead vendor for PSLV & GSLV auxiliary separation systems. Sagarika series airframes delivered.
Established Unit-II with 70,000 sq.ft — dedicated to DRDO & ISRO programmes.
First Hyderabad-based industry to produce Maraging Steel M250 rocket motor casings Ø740mm for DRDO. Over 100 casings delivered to date.
Airframes, control surfaces and motor casings for Pralay (DRDO) delivered. First unmanned crew module structure to ISRO. LVM3 Core Base Shroud completed.
First metal canister manufacturing facility for DRDO established. PSOXL motor case successfully tested — 90 casings delivered.
Airframes, motor casings and control surface panels delivered for India's first Hypersonic Glide Vehicle.
Unit-III established — 45,000 sq.ft dedicated to global defence manufacturing requirements.

title: The economics of vertical integration in aerostructures
desc: Why owning the full process chain de-risks delivery for tier-1 programmes.

desc: Thermal control, fixturing and metrology behind repeatable precision.

label: 01 // LVM3 CORE BASE SHROUD
title: LVM3 CORE BASE SHROUD
desc: THIS ASSEMBLY COMBINES ADVANCED SHEET METAL FORMING WITH ISOGRID PANEL MACHINING, STRUCTURAL RIVETING THROUGH FIXTURE AND INTEGRATION, ROLLING OF BRACKETS.

label: 02 // STABILIZER FIN ASSY.
title: STABILIZER FIN ASSEMBLY
desc: CONSTRUCTED FROM 108 COMPONENTS, THE COMPLETE FIN ASSEMBLY SHOWCASES COMPLEX MACHINING AND RIVETING OF SPECIALIZED MATERIALS LIKE TITANIUM GRADE 5, INCONEL, AND 13-8 MO.

label: 03 // NOSE CAP ASSY.
title: NOSE CAP ASSEMBLY
desc: PRECISION-FORMED NOSE CAP MACHINED FROM HIGH-STRENGTH ALUMINIUM ALLOY, FEATURING TIGHT-TOLERANCE OGIVE PROFILE AND INTEGRATED ATTACHMENT FLANGE FOR FLIGHT-CRITICAL AEROSTRUCTURE PROGRAMMES.

label: 04 // METAL CANISTER
title: METAL CANISTER
desc: SPECIALIZED MISSILE LAUNCH CANISTER UTILIZING WELDED SA516 AND 15CDV6 CONSTRUCTION. HYDRAULIC PRESSURE TESTING UP TO 10 BAR AND PNEUMATIC LEAK TESTING UP TO 0.3 BAR.

title: DESIGN REVIEW & DFM ANALYSIS
desc: Engineering review of customer drawings against our manufacturing capabilities.
detail: Tolerance stack analysis, fixturing strategy, material sourcing

title: MATERIAL PROCUREMENT & CERTIFICATION
desc: Certified raw material sourced from approved vendors with full traceability.
detail: Mill certificates, chemical composition, mechanical property verification

title: FIRST ARTICLE INSPECTION PLAN
desc: FAIR developed per AS9102 before any production run begins.
detail: Balloon drawings, measurement plan, acceptance criteria defined

title: CNC PROGRAMMING & SIMULATION
desc: 5-axis tool paths simulated and verified before cutting begins.
detail: Collision detection, cycle time optimisation, G-code validation

title: PRECISION MACHINING
desc: Multi-axis CNC milling and turning to final dimensions.
detail: In-process gauging, tool wear monitoring, coolant management

title: SPECIAL PROCESS — WELDING
desc: Certified TIG / electron beam welding in controlled clean room.
detail: WPS qualified to ISRO & DRDO standards, welder certification current

title: HEAT TREATMENT & SURFACE TREATMENT
desc: Stress relief, ageing and surface coatings applied per specification.
detail: Temperature-logged furnace records, traceability to batch

title: NDT INSPECTION
desc: Ultrasonic, dye penetrant, X-ray and eddy current inspection.
detail: Level-II certified NDT operators, reports issued per EN 4179

title: CMM & DIMENSIONAL VERIFICATION
desc: Full 3D measurement on Zeiss CMM with laser scanning arm.
detail: GD&T verification, deviation reporting, first article sign-off

title: DELIVERY & DOCUMENTATION
desc: Preservation, packaging and full documentation package dispatched.
detail: C of C, material certs, inspection reports, FAIR dossier

heroSubtext: Delivering flight-critical aerostructures, precision components and integrated assemblies for ISRO, DRDO and HAL programmes.

title: LVM3 Core Base Shroud
desc: Assembly combines advanced sheet metal forming with isogrid panel machining, structural riveting through fixture and integration, rolling of brackets.

title: Stabilizer Fin Assy.
desc: Constructed from 108 components showcasing complex machining and riveting of specialized materials like Titanium Grade 5, Inconel, and 13-8 MO.

title: RCS & VTP
desc: Integration of propellent tanks with adaptors, thrusters and pipeline assemblies.

title: Metal Canister
desc: Specialized missile launch canister utilizing welded SA516 and 15CDV6 construction. Hydraulic pressure testing up to 10 bar and pneumatic leak testing up to 0.3 bar.

title: Nose Cap
desc: Combination of honeycomb machining, welding AA2219 honeycomb sections and final assembly with lock ring, inner ring, dome and package fitting brackets.

title: Pay Load
desc: Combination of machining, riveting, and assembly.

title: SMF
desc: Features sophisticated blend of precision-machined isogrid panels and high-strength riveted assembly.

title: Air Frame Structure
desc: Assembly integrates sections with precision milling, turning and welding techniques for final structure realisation.

title: Nozzle Assy.
desc: Precision-engineered fabrication, rolling of Grade 70 plates, RT quality weld and machining to final stage maintaining thickness very accurately to avoid weight penalties for launch vehicle.

title: LEM Motor Case
desc: Fabricated from sheet rolling to machining to welding; featuring complex machining of cant angle nozzle convergents, with certificated proof pressure testing up to 132 kg/cm².

title: Sagarika Motor Case
desc: Fabricated from sheet rolling to final assembly: featuring high-precision machining, specialized heat treatment and rigorous 125 kg/cm² pressure validation.

title: Mandrel
desc: One of its kind 13 fin mandrel for S200 boosters executed by welding of Grade 70 material, machining of fins to highest accuracy, final assembly by laser inspection followed by Teflon coating.

title: TBSL
desc: Features precision machining of isogrid panels and high strength riveted assembly.

title: Astra Rocket Motor Casing
desc: Combination of flowform tube welding, machining, RT, DP, and proof pressure testing up to 210 bar.

title: Control Surface
desc: Constructed from 95 components, showcasing complex machining and riveting of specialized materials including Titanium Grade 5, Custom 465, Inconel 718 and 13-8 MO.

title: L110 EGC Actuator System Components
desc: High-precision actuator systems engineered to tolerances of 15–25 microns, featuring a sophisticated integration of 56 individual components.

title: SBS Assy.
desc: Assembly of engine mounting adaptor with 2° angular accuracy in internal section, along with rings, sheet metal formation of skins and stiffeners, assembled with riveting, jo-bolt and shear bolt fixing.

title: Slant Nose Cone Assy.
desc: Precision-engineered assembly — a combination of sheet rolling and ring machining, finalised with high-strength riveting and specialised jobolt fastening.

title: Reaction Control Structure Assy.
desc: Unique structure 700mm dia and height 2700mm. Assembly from top to bottom concentricity shall be maintained within 0.4mm, achieved by precision fixturing and assembly sequence techniques.

title: Thrust Frame
desc: Combination of sheet rolling, riveting, ring machining, and jo-bolt fixing.

title: Strap On Nose Cone Assy.
desc: Combination of sheet rolling, riveting, ring machining, and jo-bolt fixing.

title: ITS Assy.
desc: Features precision machining of rings, sheet metal formation of skins and stiffeners, assembled with riveting, jo-bolt fixing, shear bolt fixing and quality checked by laser measurement.

title: Propellant Tank Assy.
desc: Combination of machining of top dish and bottom dish welding, hydraulic pressure test up to 60 bar and pneumatic pressure test up to 45 bar.

title: Airframes Section 1A & II Assy. (AKASH)
desc: Combination of machining, riveting, and assembly of Section I & II.

name: PSLV Core Base Shroud
desc: Full structural assembly integrating aluminium alloy skins, machined rings and 15CDV6 frames — delivered across 130+ units to VSSC.

name: GSLV L40 Strapon Structures
desc: Inter-tank structures, strapon nose cones and base shrouds for L40 liquid stages. First private company to develop these in 2004.

name: LVM3 Core Base Shroud
desc: Combines advanced sheet metal forming with isogrid panel machining, structural riveting, fixture integration and bracket rolling.

name: Gaganyaan Crew Module Structure
desc: First unmanned crew module structure delivered in 2019–2020. Critical milestone in India's human spaceflight programme.

name: L110 EGC Actuator Systems
desc: High-precision actuator systems engineered to 15–25 micron tolerances, integrating 56 individual components for GSLV Mk III L110 stage.

name: PSOXL Motor Case
desc: Full segment motor casing successfully tested and delivered — 90 motor casings to date for PSLV solid stages.

name: Agni Series Motor Casings
desc: Motor casings for Agni-1, 2, 3, 4 and 5 ballistic missiles. One of the original programmes that established SVAPL's defence credentials.

name: Pralay Airframe & Motor Assembly
desc: Complete airframe structure, motor casings, control surface panels and stabiliser fins for India's tactical ballistic missile — delivered 2019.

name: Sagarika Series Motor Cases
desc: Flowform tube welding, precision machining, RT/DP inspection and proof pressure testing up to 210 Bar for submarine-launched ballistic missiles.

name: Metal Canister — A1 PRIME
desc: Specialised missile launch canister — welded SA516 and 15CDV6 construction. Hydraulic pressure testing to 10 Bar, pneumatic to 0.3 Bar. First facility of its kind in Hyderabad.

name: ASTRA Airframe
desc: 40+ airframes delivered for India's beyond-visual-range air-to-air missile. Complex machining, riveting and integration of multi-material sections.

name: Stabiliser Fin Assembly — Titanium
desc: 108-component fin assembly showcasing complex machining and riveting of Titanium Grade 5, Inconel and 13-8MO for hypersonic and tactical programmes.

name: Maraging Steel Structural Components
desc: Precision-machined legs and struts in Maraging Steel for HAL helicopter programmes — Bangalore facility.

label: Aerostructures
headline: Flight-Ready Aerostructures, From Concept to Delivery.
desc: SVAPL fabricates the primary structural elements of India's launch vehicles — fuselage panels, wing ribs, bulkheads, base shrouds, inter-tank structures and nose cones.

label: Precision Components
headline: ±5 µm across a 1.2 m envelope. Every time.
desc: Our machine shop operates 11 CNC milling centres (5-axis, 4-axis, 3-axis), 4 CNC plano mills, 4 CNC vertical turning lathes up to Ø5400 mm and 4 horizontal borers.

label: Structural Fabrication
headline: NADCAP-accredited welding of the most demanding alloys in service.
desc: Our 4,000 sq.ft ISO Class 8 clean room houses a CNC auto-TIG station with full humidity control — mandatory for welding aluminium alloys and maraging steels.

label: Assembly & Integration
headline: From individual parts to flight-certified systems.
desc: SVAPL integrates complex multi-material, multi-process assemblies — routing hydraulic lines, mounting thrusters, routing harnesses and running functional test sequences — all under our own roof.

label: Strategic Defence Systems
headline: From ballistic missile motor cases to launch canisters.
desc: SVAPL operates India's first private-sector metallic canister manufacturing facility — commissioned in 2023 for DRDO's strategic programmes.

title: The economics of vertical integration in aerostructures
desc: Why owning the full process chain — from raw material receipt through final integration — de-risks delivery timelines for tier-1 programmes.

title: Unit-III: Scaling to meet global defence requirements
desc: Our third manufacturing facility — 45,000 sq.ft on a 3-acre site in Shamshabad — is now operational and accepting new programmes.

title: How we hold ±5µm across a 1.2m envelope
desc: Thermal control protocols, custom fixturing strategies and closed-loop CMM verification behind our repeatable machining accuracy.

title: NADCAP welding: what first-article qualification really proves
desc: The accreditation discipline, operator certification cycles, and in-process inspection protocols that keep our special processes flight-safe.

title: LVM3's Core Base Shroud: an integration story
desc: From isogrid panel machining and sheet metal forming to final structural riveting — the manufacturing narrative behind LVM3's CBS assembly.

title: Metal canisters for strategic missiles: a manufacturing deep-dive
desc: How SVAPL designed India's first private-sector metallic canister facility — welding SA516 to 15CDV6, pressure-tested to 10 Bar.

title: First article qualification on PRALAY airframes
desc: Process control, dimensional verification and fatigue-cycle validation — the qualification route for Ø740mm airframes in 15CDV6.

title: Maraging Steel M250: why we invested in the capability
desc: The case for in-house Maraging Steel flow-forming, welding and heat treatment — and what it unlocked for India's strategic missile programmes.

title: CNC Programmer — 5-Axis Milling
desc: Write, verify and optimise CNC programs for 5-axis machining centres. Experience with Siemens 840D or Fanuc FOCAS. Aerospace material background preferred.

title: Senior Structural Engineer — Aerostructures
desc: Lead structural design and analysis of aluminium alloy airframe assemblies. ISRO or DRDO programme experience essential.

title: TIG Welder — Aerospace Certified
desc: Precision TIG welding of 15CDV6, AA2219, Maraging Steel and Inconel 718 in ISO 8 clean room. NADCAP-style process discipline mandatory.

title: NDT Inspector — Level II
desc: Radiography, ultrasonic and dye-penetrant inspection of motor casings and structural assemblies. ASNT Level II mandatory.

title: Quality Assurance Engineer
desc: Maintain AS9100D documentation, coordinate customer audits, manage FAIR packages and first-article inspection reports.

title: Assembly Technician — Riveted Structures
desc: Assembly of complex riveted aerostructures including hi-lok, jo-bolt and shear bolt fastening. Experience with jig-based assembly preferred.
